summary: Comprehensive testing of EDIMCO CRM Audit Log and Trash (Corbeille/Soft Delete) system completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - audit log page, corbeille page, restore, permanent delete.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login logs LOGIN action in audit_logs - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/clients creates client AND logs CREATE in audit_logs - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/clients/{id} updates client AND logs UPDATE with old/new values - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/clients/{id} soft-deletes (sets deleted_at) AND logs DELETE - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/clients excludes soft-deleted clients - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/trash returns all soft-deleted items (clients, prospects, appartements) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/trash/client/{id}/restore restores soft-deleted client AND logs RESTORE - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/trash/client/{id}/permanent permanently deletes AND logs PERMANENT_DELETE (admin only) - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/trash/client/{id}/permanent returns 403 for non-admin users - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns all logs with filters (action, entity_type, search) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/prospects creates AND logs audit - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/prospects/{id} soft-deletes AND logs audit - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/trash/prospect/{id}/restore restores prospect - PASSED
Frontend: /audit-log page loads with table of activity logs (49 actions visible) - PASSED
Frontend: Audit log page has filters (action type, entity type, search) - PASSED
Frontend: /corbeille page loads showing deleted items - PASSED
Frontend: Corbeille page has Restore button that works - PASSED
Frontend: Corbeille page has Permanent Delete button that works - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Journal d'activité' and 'Corbeille' links - PASSED
Frontend: Deleting a client shows 'déplacé dans la corbeille' message - PASSED
Frontend: Restoring from Corbeille shows 'Élément restauré avec succès' toast - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EDIMCO CRM with full Audit Log and Trash (Corbeille) system working. Key features: (1) Audit logging via audit_log() helper function logs all CRUD operations with user, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, old_values, new_values, timestamp. (2) Soft delete uses 'deleted_at' field - SOFT_DELETE_FILTER = {'deleted_at': {'$eq': None}}. (3) Trash endpoints: GET /api/trash, POST /api/trash/{type}/{id}/restore, DELETE /api/trash/{type}/{id}/permanent (admin only). (4) Frontend pages: /audit-log with filters, /corbeille with restore/permanent delete buttons. (5) All actions logged: LOGIN, LOGOUT, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, RESTORE, PERMANENT_DELETE. Auth uses Bearer token.
